label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 16

extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked with 4.8km remaining on the final 14-16% ramp at Beires, dropping ROGLIČ and KUSS to win and move within 29 seconds of red jersey.
tactical_patterns: GROVES abandoned breakaway after collecting maximum intermediate sprint points, treating stage as pure green jersey farming exercise.
JUMBO-VISMA moderated gap to protect KUSS jersey but VINGEGAARD attacked teammates anyway, revealing internal hierarchy questions ahead of final weekend.
ROGLIČ checked over shoulder for KUSS before line, confirming he prioritized distancing third-place teammate over chasing VINGEGAARD's stage win.
INEOS controlled but FISHER-BLACK finished second, suggesting team willing to sacrifice GC position for stage hunting when out of contention.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Tour fatigue narrative demolished with dominant 4.8km solo climb attack, now hunting red jersey with 29-second deficit.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: negative: Lost 4 seconds plus bonifications to both JUMBO teammates on sub-5km climb, suggests vulnerability on Angliru's longer ramps.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Attacked to distance KUSS for second place but didn't chase VINGEGAARD, revealing he accepts team pecking order.
rider_signals.FISHER-BLACK Finn: positive: Isolated INEOS rider finished second on punchy 16% ramps, signals breakaway threat on Angliru if released early.
rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: Strong late acceleration on final 16% ramp after long day, dangerous in reduced-group finishes on steep gradients.
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: neutral: Made every early break attempt solely for sprints then abandoned before climb, maximizing green jersey math efficiency.
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: Probing attacks with ALMEIDA on final ramp suggests form building, potential podium threat with two mountain stages remaining.
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: Finished with favorites group but passive, losing ground to AYUSO in podium battle despite similar time gap.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: Probing with AYUSO but couldn't follow VINGEGAARD acceleration, confirms classification position but not stage-winning legs.
